description: Embeds an additional image inside a product detail page body — separate from the product's main gallery (for spec sheets, certifications, lifestyle shots, etc.). Used as a nested block inside the `product-info` section. Use when: a static image needs to appear alongside textual blocks in the product body. Skip when: the catalog's main gallery is enough (rendered automatically by `product-info`), or a section-level image is wanted (use `sections/image` instead). `image` is the image URL — leave empty if the user did not supply one.
